items.title: Long Easy Run
items.description: Run 12 km at an easy pace of 7:30 min/km. Maintain a heart rate in Zone 2 (130-150 bpm).

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: Warm up for 10 minutes, then perform 6x400m intervals at 5:15 min/km pace with 2 minutes recovery jog between each. Cool down for 10 minutes.

items.title: Tempo Run
items.description: Run 8 km with the middle 4 km at a tempo pace of 6:00 min/km. Keep your heart rate in Zone 3 (150-170 bpm) during the tempo segment.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Focus on full-body strength training for 45 minutes, including squats, lunges, and core exercises. Aim for 3 sets of 12-15 reps for each exercise.
